images.title: Building Technical Textiles
images.context_text: Products related to isolation, roofing systems and advertising media. Military and Disaster Tents Fabric.

images.title: ArInter
images.context_text: ArInter can be used by designers and architects to decorate an environment and to give function to the area. It is possible to add extra function like high visibility. The fabric has odor cleaning photocatalytic function. Flame retardant function is usefull for indoor usage. Any aestetic properties can be added by creating flat or curved shapes, globes, pyramids, spirals or cubes.

text_blocks.text: Products related to isolation, roofing systems and advertising media. Military and Disaster Tents Fabric. Building Technical Textiles
Products related to isolation, roofing systems and advertising media. Military and Disaster Tents Fabric.
Products related to isolation, roofing systems and advertising media. Military and Disaster Tents Fabric.
Products related to isolation, roofing systems and advertising media. Military and Disaster Tents Fabric.
250 g/m² , 92% Polyester 8% Elastane, Flexible, Dirt Repellent, Antibacterial, Tension Fabric

ArInter can be used by designers and architects to decorate an environment and to give function to the area. It is possible to add extra function like high visibility. The fabric has odor cleaning photocatalytic function. Flame retardant function is usefull for indoor usage. Any aestetic properties can be added by creating flat or curved shapes, globes, pyramids, spirals or cubes. Tension Fabric Stuctures for Inside Decoration - ArInter - Ariteks
Products related to isolation, roofing systems and
advertising media. Military and Disaster Tents Fabric.
Building Technical Textiles
ArInter
250 gr/m
2
, 92% Polyester 8% Elastane, Flexible, Dirt Repellent, Antibacterial, Tension Fabric
ArInter can be used by designers and architects to decorate an environment and
to give function to the area.
It is possible to add extra function like high visibility. The fabric has odor cleaning photocatalytic function.
Flame retardant function is usefull for indoor usage.
Any aestetic properties can be added by creating flat or curved shapes, globes,
pyramids, spirals or cubes.
